description: Google Ads API configuration for Lead Gen Jay. Reusable by any skill needing keyword data, campaign metrics, or ad insights.

modules.client: client.py — GoogleAdsClient wrapper with search(), search_stream(), mutate()
modules.operations: operations/ — keywords.py, campaigns.py, bids.py, ads.py, ad_groups.py

notes.cost: FREE — no per-query cost for Keyword Planner via API
notes.python_version_warning: System Python is 3.9.6 (EOL). google-ads works but shows deprecation warnings. Consider upgrading.
notes.rate_limits: Keyword Planner has daily request limits. Batch keywords into single calls (up to 2000 per request).
